segments.text: The Lord is great in Zion, And He is high above all the peoples.
Let them praise Your great and awesome name— He is holy.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The King's strength also loves justice; You have established equity; You have executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.
Exalt the Lord our God, And worship at His footstool— He is holy.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Moses and Aaron were among His priests, And Samuel was among those who called upon His name;
They called upon the Lord, and He answered them.
segments.speaker: Moses, Aaron, and Samuel

segments.text: He spoke to them in the cloudy pillar; They kept His testimonies and the ordinance He gave them.
You answered them, O Lord our God; You were to them God-Who-Forgives, Though You took vengeance on their deeds.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Exalt the Lord our God, And worship at His holy hill; For the Lord our God is holy.
segments.speaker: The Lord
